ogTitle: Canteen Creek vs Casuarina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Canteen Creek and Casuarina.
heading: Canteen Creek vs Casuarina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Canteen Creek, Northern Territory and Casuarina, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Casuarina has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Canteen Creek (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Canteen Creek or Casuarina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Canteen Creek has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Casuarina scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Canteen Creek scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Casuarina scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Canteen Creek or Casuarina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Casuarina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
